description: Create a 'Staff Picks' block on the homepage (http://localhost) in the 'Content' region of the 'Olivero' theme. The block must display exactly 3 products marked as 'Promoted to front page', sorted by newest first, using a teaser or grid format. Ensure the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones, Apple MacBook Pro 16", and Canon EOS R6 Mirrorless Camera are the products featured. Log in with admin / Admin1234!.
